notes: json_table emits a deterministic table descriptor document
json_table COLUMNS ON ERROR route emits the same bounded descriptor form
json_table document jsonpath COLUMNS form has descriptor coverage without row scanning
array_to_json preserves a JSON array document
array_to_json pretty route uses deterministic JsonPretty output
json_object text-array variant builds deterministic key/value object text
jsonb_agg scalar harness returns a deterministic JSON array over supplied arguments
jsonb_agg expr route returns a one-element JSON array
row_to_json preserves object-like JSON row documents
row_to_json pretty route uses deterministic JsonPretty output
odd-length text-array json_object input refuses with exact invalid-input diagnostic
